Title: Establishes minority youth-owned business enterprises
Summary: Establishes minority youth-owned business enterprises in the state of New York and the city of New York; creates certain contracting opportunities for members of minority youth-owned business enterprises; establishes an implementation program and oversight committee for minority youth-owned business enterprises.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law and the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to establishing minority youth-owned business enterprises
